title: Statistical questions
description: Practice spotting the difference between statistical and non-statistical questions.

assessment_items.question_content:
Musa wondered, *"What is the typical height of dog kennels at Keita's Kennels?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Sylvie asked, *"Do college tennis coaches generally get paid more than college football coaches?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**


[[☃ radio 2]]

Antonio wondered, *"At the Minnesota Zoo, do spider monkeys typically weigh more than owl monkeys?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**


[[☃ radio 2]]

Lauren asked Katya, *"Does it typically rain more in the United States or in Brazil?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**


[[☃ radio 2]]

Eren asked Levi, *"In general, how tall are giraffes?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**


[[☃ radio 2]]

Noelle wondered, *"How many acorns do squirrels typically eat in a day?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Tuma wondered, *"On average, how many books do Americans read each year?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Geraldo asked Ruth, *"About how many people show up to play bingo each week?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Dev asked, *"What is the typical area of an elephant's ear?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Kiera wondered, *"How much was my last paycheck for?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Cristina asked José, *"Did you watch television last night?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Mirando asked Jimmy, *"Do you have a college degree?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Jotaro wondered, *"How far is Egypt from Japan?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Edna wondered, *"How many teeth are in my mouth?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Rashid asked the genie, *"How many wishes have you granted?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Ms. Diaz asked her students, *"How many days are in June?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Feng asked Da-eun, *"How old are you?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

Khadija asked Muhammad, *"How many text messages have you sent today?"*

**Is this a statistical question?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
